question: What are the ids of the documents that have more than one child?
sql: SELECT Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Objects WHERE Parent_Document_Object_ID IN (SELECT Parent_Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Objects GROUP BY Parent_Document_Object_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)

back_translation.intent: 查找符合条件的文档对象ID
filters: Parent_Document_Object_ID IN (SELECT Parent_Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Objects GROUP BY Parent_Document_Object_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)

semantic.reason: 过滤条件包含额外的Owner='Ransom'、Description='Marlin'、Other_Details='Braeden'限制，而原始问题未提及这些条件。
